title: Amsterdam University College
open_hours: {"Friday":["8 am–7 pm"],"Monday":["8 am–10 pm"],"Saturday":["12–6 pm"],"Sunday":["12–6 pm"],"Thursday":["8 am–10 pm"],"Tuesday":["8 am–10 pm"],"Wednesday":["8 am–10 pm"]}
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Danique Davis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXvAzUOL8TTqaSF4vdYq27islqKG7kcIQhjirNWEySGvTzJHUQa=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"If you’re looking for an overall high standard of professors, this is a great school to attend. Most of the teachers are highly passionate about what they’re teaching and the intimate class sizes promote a strong and discussion based learning space. Communication with administrative faculty is however a complete nightmare. They lack giving response and action to any complaints, regardless of their urgency, and they would rather have you solve the problem yourself than doing their job and try to help you the best they can. They don’t deliver response by their own set deadlines and overall don’t seem to care about their students. They have a lot to learn from North American universities when it comes to communicating properly with both prospective and arguably more importantly current students. Considering we pay double the tuition in comparison to other Dutch universities you would expect a higher level of concern and care about any complaints that can and should be easily avoided. While the university promotes excellence, their overall care for their students shows they are far from it.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ana-Maria Oprescu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX2vhpqLpOl07FydXQz4c9R_bUYG5Kqcgr1jbI0zH4DAv7ZRVeD=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Interesting take on higher education, with highly motivated students that are personally catered for by many lecturers including a tutor. Higher fees means a narrower category of students, with diversity being ensured by scholarships. The teaching staff is assisted by a large support group that tends to alleviate most administrative issues. There is a cafe/restaurant on site.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Noah Reichel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUmpWjMY-wyBfhxFI2C02ni7NOFDoms4Fye0V97Vn85JA3tvdVx=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Worst admission procedure I have ever been through. I applied in January 2021 and only got a response six months later. In the meantime, the school did not sufficiently inform me and other applicants on the status of our application. In the end, I only received the final decision on my application one week before the start of the semester. Unfortunately, I was not the only applicant treated in this unacceptable fashion.

Another issue me and other applicants faced was an unwillingness to answer and address basic questions send via email. In some cases my emails were even completely  ignored. And if you are lucky and finally receive an answer the original question was often not properly answer. For example, I asked the AUC admissions office about the math requirements for German students whether they mean an average of 11 points in all semesters + the Abiturprüfung or if they mean the grade in the Abiturprüfung. I am still waiting for an answer to this day.

To me it seemed that the whole admission procedure leaked structure and clear guidelines. For instance, at what point applicants can assume to get a response on their application. Moving from one country to the other in the span of two is just not possible!

Please note that this is not a review of the overall experience at AUC but just a review of the application procedure from my perspective and from what I have heard from multiple other applicants.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Freddy Sapatinov","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWihgBKkU-0QnV0bfmAmz6LWzGjLekc3Jv3QqkEKDLnjyG3iJ0=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The best, I recommend it to everyone!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"SilverStarStorm “Alicja”","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXPspbmuBh6wzJNqx9BVVJSTwiliNV7lGovu5MU_UXNXpK17BWg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Nice university, cool program, good community, has quite a few systemic issues :\","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nani P.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXi8968MZ5M2E-Ls5CeeXCztDS8mjOqLIZ5GDWFTHOEZ3Ukoqre0w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I have actually never been here, I am currently in the US looking at schools to go to once I move there with my daughter, my sister and my nephew. I'm not quite sure how to apply to the schools I have been looking at. I don't see a place to apply when I go to the websites. If anyone from the Netherlands could assist me I would greatly appreciate it.

*Gonna leave the 5 stars for all the good reviews I've read <3","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Shoshanna Jiang","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIm31k6hI8FjscU5nvgVI_aEMegxz7Heg3K7zUn9qqJG1GCFA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Terrible terrible administration that does not want to help students at all. The method of choosing classes is outdated and backwards and the class selection is small.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Bernard J. Sales","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXBKl2jOC6-LFaSDak_pPtM8PuLUQILeyqIHyQADhgwRO4ISuE=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"AUC boasts a team of highly motivated educators who excel in their respective fields. Classes are conducted in small groups, allowing for a unique approach that encourages students to blend subjects across various disciplines, including sciences, humanities, and social sciences, provided they have the necessary prerequisite knowledge.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Robin Irwin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW615jhkCvPlD07WzM1F3WM-xAfYrwWeuapAEUmYuLWZ8guMUA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"On the roof of the Gerrit van der Veen College are two bronze statues made by Hildo Krop (1884-1970).

The man at the front of the tower is a farmer with a hook in one hand and a sickle in the other.  The other figure represents Amor.

The tower is part of a school that has a troubled past.  During the German occupation in World War II, the Sicherheitsdienst (SD) was located in the building from 1940.

From this headquarters the SD organized the deportation of the Jewish Amsterdammers and here they interrogated and tortured resistance fighters.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipPicNSv7r1GRDxO_IidomzFhEjsefcjcagOdwgv&fid=0x0:0x9987c9974a327f97"],"When":"2022-1-27"},{"Name":"JAY","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVk_Lov5Agp88ojS8Rtgw0jLMEMYRUUyxiEbrkCB66sR_-7NI8=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Is ok","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sebastiaan Bosklopper","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLOl-8gK7sFymLdJaAFLo4rR7e_z9i4KLWKYwT90Mil9QGVVVs=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Guys, look at this cool hedgehog I saw guys :]","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipPm-WfjBo-16byQRIb3kYb8G2R8nihIRvm_9q0l&fid=0x0:0x9987c9974a327f97"],"When":"2022-9-3"},{"Name":"Joost Bram","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ5Q_l4KKA0_BjwkrkAz9FxoU4a25n74AkZ7mbDWIGfTU-GnQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Waanzinnig leuke school! Veel betrokken en ervaren docenten. Mijn kind haalde altijd onvoldoendes voor wiskunde, maar dankzij de kennis, ervaring, inzet, visuele ppt's en regelmatige huiswerkcontroles van de nieuwe wiskundedocent haalt mijn kind nu een acht. Zo'n ervaren en bekwame docenten werken daar.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Linda Vierenberg","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKOc3ipUEZHAe9xFwRF-w9U8URMVSN8mL9P2LzxQpKHFZ_DbQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"leuk dat iedereen nu vlak voor de opendagen opeens positieve reviews geeft. Even een ander en wat mij betreft realistischer geluid. Het is inderdaad een leuke school en net als bij andere scholen doet iedereen vast hard zijn best daarvoor. Wat echter een serieus probleem is dat er grote uitval is van leraren: zo heeft ons kind nu al 4 maanden geen wiskunde leraar en loopt dus al maanden achter. Ze heeft nu een inval leraar die geen Nederlands spreekt, maar alleen Turks. De vraag is of ouders van toekomstige leerlingen hierover wel eerlijk worden geïnformeerd.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"kaaskip metmais","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVWTJcvhydXArWG7SvqW78DZUXDo-1l3DfjXz2GpCuOAl4oLRI=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Leuke school maar ik ga echt van het gebouw springen door wisk","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Marline Bakker","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK1XozDg1r9P3vugNmBOEFboZNAQd4ggTLqK25UcPUU138wZg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Deze school is precies wat we ervan verwacht hadden. Onze dochter gaat iedere dag met plezier!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"olet meurs","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJo3FFqJrjOwfagy2MGO1aSX-ztNdgC2vJj7rmMnbuQWu0mHQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Erg leuke school! user_reviews: [{"Name":"Roland van Marlen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLwfIAo7SYIYFe3I-7fc-0TakHjrhg7BOOPinEPmxFwunaahic=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excellent private school with a curriculum and ambition that clearly exceeds the standard public education.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Oscar Hernandez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWkx4Lr3KtpJPfEsu96Y4goWEhFMulJqcWX1Jg0Y6FmjgsHRG0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We can call it a temple of learning","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Samantha van der roest","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW2cHzhUDBVK6sotRnyMeRL-eCvySprnd5cQv-CkzsWxAkA0PJk=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"EuroCollege Amsterdam verdient zeker 5 sterren. De gehele ambiance en gemoedelijkheid op deze vestiging is van een ander niveau. Persoonlijke begeleiding, lessen van de beste praktijk docenten en een opleiding op niveau volgen kan hier zeker. De combinatie van theorie en praktijk wordt tijdens de versnelde studie fantastisch verwerkt en, op een snel maar haalbaar tempo, wordt je alles geleerd van de gekozen opleiding. De staf medewerkers, docenten en medestudenten maken de school wat het is en hierom is EuroCollege Amsterdam de perfecte school om een hospitality of business opleiding te volgen. Voor zekerheid in de praktijk is EuroCollege de juiste stap om te zetten richting de toekomst.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Chanel De Ruijter","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXl7j1WETLF2sAFgVjMKqfxS824CcqTkGkryK857eOZsEqKXaYr=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Het EuróCollege in Amsterdam verdient zonder twijfel een 5-sterrenbeoordeling voor zijn uitstekende onderwijs, inspirerende docententeam, en topfaciliteiten. De warme en uitnodigende sfeer bevordert een gevoel van gemeenschap, terwijl het curriculum studenten de praktische en theoretische kennis biedt die nodig is voor succes. Docenten zijn niet alleen vakkundig, maar ook oprecht betrokken bij studenten, waardoor een motiverende leeromgeving ontstaat. Met moderne faciliteiten en een rijke buitenschoolse cultuur, in het hart van het bruisende Amsterdam, is het EuróCollege een voortreffelijke keuze voor een goed afgeronde, verrijkende educatieve ervaring.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tim Moojen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK9YOqAJ6VWJe5VfNg-n5oI9Ez0qpHm-4J3O7rgYT6ezMwyeg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Mijn ervaring met mijn HBO-opleiding is buitengewoon positief geweest. De opleiding biedt uitstekende begeleiding en ondersteuning aan studenten, waardoor ik me altijd gesteund voelde tijdens mijn studie. De docenten zijn zeer deskundig en betrokken, en ze zijn altijd beschikbaar om vragen te beantwoorden en advies te geven. Bovendien is de school goed georganiseerd en biedt het een stimulerende leeromgeving die studenten uitdaagt om hun volledige potentieel te bereiken. Kortom, mijn HBO-opleiding is een fantastische school die ik van harte zou aanbevelen aan anderen.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Danique Slabbers","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ4ASasYQzodyLjF6doO5qskdpR3A60Lj2ZmXqWJAgL-UHOrw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Als student van EuroCollege Amsterdam kan ik zeggen dat dit een uitstekende keuze is voor ambitieuze studenten die op zoek zijn naar een uitdagende en praktijkgerichte opleiding. Veel persoonlijke begeleiding en ondersteuning, en docenten die waardevolle praktijkervaring overbrengen, maken dit een unieke school.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Steven Groenendijk","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ1r0eX-lWiT1E3vhGLgaVuLIxSI2Ot5zh0CyjeFLAygrPL4Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Mijn studie aan EuroCollege in Amsterdam is absoluut vijf sterren waard. Het uitstekende onderwijs, de betrokken docenten, fijne medestudenten en zeer gewaardeerde stafleden creëren samen een onvergetelijke leeromgeving.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"gino de boer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIP90BoiGAf8UwvPdq3L2oekA_dqkFmQv87bnobhtLwRS0I3A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Op latere leeftijd toch nog een hbo studie willen doen. Ik had mij geen betere school kunnen wensen dan EuroCollege. De staff die altijd voor je klaar staat en de docenten uit het bedrijfsleven waar je echt veel van leert. Een school die mindset stimuleert.","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews: [{"Name":"sophia cartwright","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKtjQLkXgE_-YPAL_bzMUpl2FpA0dZ5ZYHRsqIWYIsCcIkLlw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a phenomenal experience here!! Such an absolute gem of a program! The VU summer school team running the experience was so kind and helpful at every turn; I miss seeing them everyday! I had never been to Amsterdam before and they made the city feel accessible and inviting! I took a two week course with incredible professors who made sure that everyone was comfortable while they taught remarkable material; they even took us on excursions to relevant facilities. I so very much loved my weeks here; any amount of time is well spent at VU, but if you can, stay for even longer than I did! I was wishing it wasn't over by the time July ended.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Анастасия Малых","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXeYTsVl1jpa8_YnQ_9CRkUIEWt-1NE_mRm6wfVXK4G1xLlcJQf=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It was one of the best experience I've ever had! Super interesting lectures. Great organization. Super cool and modern university, inspiration is built into its walls.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipPgLLQ9QGnEISJthBOx9xvujroGLj5PC5EugipK\u0026fid=0x0:0x1ffb250f2b729e86"],"When":"2018-7-12"},{"Name":"Larasati Indah Sukmaputri","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVffuHu4X44pSedeg9C1ytFrHsgu5Tadf72KC7GXjwKcuo_KsIx=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"First time on Netherlands! Amsterdam has such a nice weather when i came, sunny days with a few wind to let me to cool off a bit. Participating in Summer School Program in VU gave me an amazing experience learning in a lovely city and in a beautiful and excellent-facilitation campus, such as excellent access, excellent building, especially a very nice canteen and garden. They gave us an organized, ease program but with a lot of experience starting from learning from the real thing, exciting social programs, and fun social events among the Summer School Program Participants! I would recommend this program to as many people as i can, thank you VU!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipN2cRlSnr73gfwJuFfGlmLYgm8Z8hxwWooQ7-eO\u0026fid=0x0:0x1ffb250f2b729e86"],"When":"2018-7-11"},{"Name":"Bradley Hart","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXKyk4FaPfQxFTl3tLYqft4PZ6NYDVRBI9VNUzqfZ90I-Lnneel=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Summer school experience was amazing! I highly would recommend going especially if it's your first time in the Netherlands. Staff are supportive and the workload is manageable whilst also having great social events. Great work/ life balance and you get a certificate at the end of it plus the campus itself has some exceptional learning resources.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"IRNR INDONESIA","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWhnn3IdZl_Ylfq2xXSjOZ8wSWjmDm7zUzZBV21LgycYLxda9hJ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The VU International team was very amazing.\n-willie- | one of the winner videography scholarship at VU Amsterdam","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipOoLhoDPPHRyi2mEftNVPJfnbAy7f0Tdpz5JtOQ\u0026fid=0x0:0x1ffb250f2b729e86"],"When":"2019-7-31"},{"Name":"Aleksandra Jaremko","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIXKymqhx0-QAvfvx8bmG0lOcA7FcRiiTrz4-ukuhFE9cnfLg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently attended the Applied Quantitative Methods course at VU Summer School and it was truly outstanding! The curriculum covered a wide range of topics, including statistical analysis, econometrics, data visualization, and modeling techniques. The practical exercises and resources provided were excellent, allowing for hands-on application of the learned concepts. The emphasis on real-world applications was a highlight, demonstrating the practical utility of the methods. I highly recommend this course to anyone looking to enhance their quantitative skills. Overall, a fantastic learning experience!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Korede Adekanye","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX7zJWq9Jwy462ytb3jne6jWLR5_0pxSId4Vgp29gJj-SkJ4UDq=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Today is the last day of the summer school and it has been more than amazing! Very well organised by the nicest people. The lectures were interesting and informative. The social programs were great. Overall, no regrets, I loved every bit of my time at VU Amsterdam Summer School and would definitely recommend it!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alexis Fillone","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWpiGYU4YDP-esFDZ1DaOtavL9A9MI-b0g15effSPKOpqoOPak=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I was able to learn Social network analysis and R programming in the Big Data and Society class in a two-week period.  It was a great learning experience.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipMu956x_9AIaXAy0iumbngeOy0ND1SXThUyOhlG\u0026fid=0x0:0x1ffb250f2b729e86"],"When":"2019-7-17"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Nikolas Ciuchi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK7mpIdDek5PoA4t9tlTkYnKeZ0w2C0UBUIWgA9XKKzQAx4SQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Truly a friendly atmosphere, and I was pleasantly surprised by the inclusiveness and kindness. Not a student; this is just an outsider's opinion. The harshest critics I have read seem to focus more on the quality of life and accessibility of international students.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ire","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLPZ7oVeILq2vmfxC1j5VmHqYL3nw_7k9Xu5_IvOWfXF6fdysJZ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Dutch education for international student is a joke in general!!!
Before you signed up, they lure you with how international, immersive, and diverse they are. However, after you begin your course, you will find out that you are in a very helpless situation as an international.
Dutch university did a really good job in marketing and ripping money form all the international students. I highly recommend international students to go to other country for higher education!!!
Beside being helpless in class and in school, the housing situation in Amsterdam is also crazy. I know few student apartments’ waiting list can be up to 100+ people waiting for one room. Cheaper student apartments start from 700+ euro, expensive one can be up to 900+ or 1000+, which is a lot for students.
However, I still find some professor very helpful and caring (few). This is probably the reason why I still give 4 stars review. The campus itself is combined with new and old. The cafeteria food is okish but affordable for student. Sometimes there will be people dancing salsa in the baseball court.
Anyway, if I got the chance to study abroad again, I definitely will not choose Dutch university :)","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipMKiLEn56aunTR9QBtIbHIEYaQF1QWGlQbdrb1J&fid=0x0:0x2df2d7a997eccd84"],"When":"2022-9-12"},{"Name":"Berit van der Jagt","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUR_v23AVPFp06JDbMH5I33FbTHRi684xfbJg9S7rclBDnaDGHMQw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Good university with kind study counselors. My favourite professor until now is Erik Scherder. When he talks you just want to listen! Great study program with interesting courses. They also try to make it easier for students to have a say in things. The building is old though and I don't like the look on the inside and outside. Before corona I remember that I couldn't find places to sit, because it was way too crowded.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipNOyyS8Co4TCC-vLIqZ7KXnOiiGfkFom_thyGHr&fid=0x0:0x2df2d7a997eccd84"],"When":"2021-5-4"},{"Name":"Jose Javier Marsal Gil","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUNmBzZSup1rCamXCVdca-fbZIvLtYFfoxbuZYqAlzmG84DvVL0Vw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My South African son has been a student for two years and very happy. The biggest problem in Amsterdam is getting accomodation,specially for students. Close to the university is around 700 euros per month. The further you go the cheaper. Obviously by bicycle easy to get around. Eating is affordable and other expenses.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipOoMo6bogTTZSzF6Rj_4CTOlVdjGyoaf41m8wAh&fid=0x0:0x2df2d7a997eccd84"],"When":"2021-5-9"},{"Name":"Akib Iftakher","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIU7o41ZsZ68NZLgAtIQb2R1aay60wGoSOvdcjdplEjaA3wyC8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"It has been a tradition for me to visit Universities in the cities I am passing through. Later I found that one of my friend with whom I didn’t meet for last 2 years due to distance and covid was studying here. One thing which makes sense that why the University is outside of the city.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipNlhFiDFUy-eh6kAB1ReACQXfFbQNVoDf-TrODS&fid=0x0:0x2df2d7a997eccd84"],"When":"2022-9-4"},{"Name":"Rania Mouzakiti","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVZ1MOi0VPSMB_ytm5RQgRMPwvCp1Mzet_AMGeZyw-KFPqPfaA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I did an MA in Arts and Culture at the VU (2013-2015). I had an accident and I broke my knee while I was studying there and I received a true lack of understanding and flexibility from the teachers when it came to attending classes in-person with a leg on cast. Also, half of the reading material is actually in Dutch and when they advertise all the exciting possibilities for cool internships, they fail to mention that it's for Dutch speakers only. It's shocking that as an EU citizen, you pay the same amount of tuition fees as a Dutch person but you get back so little.

And the cherry on top? I am now looking to study again and I need a recommendation letter from a former professor and this degree is the most recent degree I have. There wasn't a single (not a single) faculty member that did not refuse to help me. They all refused to write a simple recommendation letter attesting to the fact that I've actually studied there and my grades were actually decent! I can't help but wonder if I would've gotten the same treatment if I was Dutch.

I don't know if it's the department or the VU as a whole, and obviously acquiring a degree has become a huge industry but this place is really not worth the money, you can do better.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Priscilla RVR","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWUT3xrips-CtclM4TFWutG5DymgyBiQXDm3-Utxe428f1sguDU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The best place to learn Dutch language. It’s intensive and expensive, but it's worth it. You can use the DUO Loan to help you about the finances. They have superb curriculum and method that help you to learn Dutch so fast. Even though they are so good, but they need to upgrade the online system interfaces. The online system still looks like website in the year 2000. You can’t open in your tablet because still using flash media player and not user friendly.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipMGsDxLhnr6S6SV4Zv7gZDmVmOWmNKlFLf5sa0d&fid=0x0:0x2df2d7a997eccd84"],"When":"2017-12-20"},{"Name":"Shubham Mundra","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW0eAyzA8g9X1JZ5Y7AaX6pZLJ_Zc8SGv36R0eidrk4wNbAvTNX=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The university campus is small if you compare it with other universities with the same QS ranking but they have everything a student might need.

They have most number of courses offered in Netherlands I guess, also they have joint courses with University of Amsterdam.

They have very experienced faculties and a lot of them have contributed towards research which explains why a lot of students study there.

The vibe is chill at the university and their Introduction days are super fun!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipN69ZQRmOHLD59aaF5lhg-kvZP8QPTrfClRXFYK&fid=0x0:0x2df2d7a997eccd84"],"When":"2019-11-11"}]

title: Europass Teacher Academy
user_reviews: [{"Name":"Demi Rouv","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVdVJzrT906E3e4K9tmcQi6wnOcene2ZTSvwpDhBtJlXQQosrM=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A great experience as a whole. We learned interesting things at the Europass Teacher Academy, attending the course ''21st Century Skills for Teachers and Students''. Our instructor Cecilia was very friendly and helpful and always willing to help and guide us. We also enjoyed our stay in Amsterdam where we had the chance to visit the Van Gogh museum and Anna Frank's House, took a boat trip on the canals, saw the windmills at Zaanse Schans and took a glimpse of Utrecht and Hague.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipOujvWr-CVHaryEXCJ2G07tSUJAEDB-xR0X93MM\u0026fid=0x0:0x3ac685732f407f36"],"When":"2024-7-1"},{"Name":"Miléna Minière","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIzLJc-iCLQb6kXb178gdG1e-yiOfDhD5vgf0WfMNnNLbFWyA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Very good training experience with Europass Teacher Academy. The good email communication before the course enabled me to complete certain administrative documents and get answers to our questions about the course, the country, etc. The teacher Diana Chavez was great ! She gave us the keys to progress in a practical and fun way. The training centre is well located and very pleasant, with a space to talk with European participants from other courses. I would recommend taking a course with this organisation.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipN1QxzlL4iDkCONYh5yAZHsWS_Edl6HqcAFSunB\u0026fid=0x0:0x3ac685732f407f36"],"When":"2024-5-2"},{"Name":"ΑΓΓΕΛΙΚΗ ΛΟΥΜΠΑΡΔΙΑ","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUP5Dq8EMHJwVukQnEy0pm9bAYmqky1BWaR8MZHro_gXO4sinnM=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It was an excellent experience! We were trained in very interesting subjects that will help us in school. The hospitality at the host organization Europass Teacher Avademy was perfect! Also the cultural activities and Amsterdam unforgettable!!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipN-ln2-OdUIs2l9iP18DncW32rg6--fo1X9-As8\u0026fid=0x0:0x3ac685732f407f36"],"When":"2024-3-11"},{"Name":"Vesna Funda Štefanek","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW95RM_ychvRsaCZoxSMFZq3pD5q-w8WL2Kf63xS5ornKXFbFMcMg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The course was very interesting and I will apply a lot of it in my work at school (activities, work methods...). The atmosphere throughout the course was very pleasant thanks to the mentor - Mr Jarek Sacharski. The end of the course and the little certificate ceremony was really nice.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipP5_S20vGOK4NR6I4CFsW7NCMbYHh7STmLs19pl\u0026fid=0x0:0x3ac685732f407f36"],"When":"2023-9-24"},{"Name":"Liisa Kolehmainen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKBGDvOz-KJ84y2ieh73c87Us342BK0ffoiPXg2CP4kR_gL=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a wonderful time at Europass teacher academy. The location was great. It was easy to find and it was close by to everywhere. The facilities were comfortable and our teacher was very knowledgeable and very good with ict. The best part was meeting and getting to know colleagues from across Europe.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipM7b96VYsSpZ-0uEg3fgf8Do7COLzRRZlCJRgg\u0026fid=0x0:0x3ac685732f407f36"],"When":"2024-6-12"},{"Name":"Helena Giannaki","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWUTLIuX5CeTIykiuErNfm_3jQxOtd6rZlXDnR2M4IaIdpRy1Py=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"An excellent training experience for me and my colleagues with the Europass Teacher Academy in Amsterdam. Very well organized training sessions enriching our knowledge about the use of AI tools in education.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipMeq5YOEzRE5b3HI5P7qaAX2fGh5qPcmAzhk8Rn\u0026fid=0x0:0x3ac685732f407f36"],"When":"2024-12-1"},{"Name":"Μαρία Δάμπρα","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUGQjlsg1ECKDGdEYpATHGkak8JRcsCtpgmxMyZSgwzpENnjqo=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We attended the course on Deep Democracy in Amsterdam. Our course instructor, Nastajja Canello, was great! Very supportive and encouraging throughout the course, she made us feel like home, she helped us connect with each other and share feelings and experiences, creating in this way a very cozy and relaxed atmoshere. The course material she provided us with was well organised and presented. We really loved Nastajja and we found the course very interesting and motivating. The school premises are located in a very quiet and beautiful area in the city centre, not very far away from sights and museums. The interior of the building was very cozy and beautiful. The whole staff was very helpful, providing information and preparing paperwork always on time. We really enjoyed our time in Amsterdam and Molinos de Viento. We highly recommend this course, as well as the school.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipMl0PwtEpyzGBBxfvKhAP0hJJPpjnGwJZvWVlpE\u0026fid=0x0:0x3ac685732f407f36"],"When":"2023-4-13"},{"Name":"Marta Cueto","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIy9elVkE-7sUdJFToVgRg5X5nu_8-MKEdQFc_1WvNiH3uLnQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This experiencia has been really positive. I am very grateful to our teacher, Nastajja Canello at Molinos de Viento, in Ámsterdam, as she is very patient and does a very good job.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipMp7kZ3BsRBjwefEjuE2OoSeDudV7o2dMFZPIXK\u0026fid=0x0:0x3ac685732f407f36"],"When":"2024-4-21"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Bert Kees","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJfX7fGXp4oXtPat6p8WsrSdXuOvvbQ3pXEw74QonKuDl-Mvg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Als wat de school beweert klopt niet. De school werkt voor geen meter. Als ik de examenbureau was zou me echt doodschamen voor wat ze doen!!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kees Van der Kogel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKGcLHoea5-WsszY0O9lZ_uAS6jTCAyyNODOUbiOU7NoDxqVPs=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Merk de vreselijke bureaucratisch proces, regels en eisen die plots komen op de school (WAAR NIKS OVER IN STAAT OP HET PTA) en je snap mijn ster :)","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"David Starreveld","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWkJEOABRBwy-LR5jwD_T2d6lgYxy6sdyA6Nt5gptnHb23SYRUkKw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Ontzettend tergende communicatie en besluitvoering. Tijdens de intake aangegeven dat ik later in zou stromen ivm een reis die al gepland stond en dat ik aan een nieuwe baan (met traningdagen) zou beginnen en daarom lessen zou missen. Ook ben ik in behandeling voor een chronische ziekte en op basis daarvan zou ik dispensatie kunnen aanvragen.

Nu ben ik dit jaar begonnen en mag ik geen toets maken omdat een reis in het buitenland geen geldige rede is om dispensatie aan te vragen, terwijl ik wel ben aangemomen en bovenstaande allemaal expliciet hebben besproken op de intake.

Er wordt dus ja en amen geknikt op de intake waar geen rekening wordt gehouden met de daadwerkelijke bureaucratische processen. Ik heb op basis van mijn verhaal groen licht gekregen en nu mag ik geen toets maken door inadequate communicatie, verwachtings & intake management.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Daan Grootbroek","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ-pSRVOQ6JJ-uFjdVszlvS85ZKdhklYg2XvGYMqoQpoGcaog=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Houden weinig rekening met leerlingen die net wat extra aandacht nodig hebben, mijn zoon zou havo doen maar echter niet af kunnen maken, omdat het allemaal een HEEL slecht georganiseerd is! Contact krijgen met de school is al een vak op zich zelf, want mailtjes en belletjes worden vaak genegeerd.

Als je een diploma wilt halen raad ik het Joke Smit af! Het is onrealistisch om met een rooster van 8 lessen in de week een diploma te halen. 8 lessen vind ik zeer weinig.

Er wordt snel gedacht in problemen in plaats van oplossingen!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sascha Cornelia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWxifaKmdHah31iPvkUCY-IDIsWH3OXoR2tiSppYwC6Gh_Ma4Ye=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Ik heb een fijne twee jaar gehad op deze school. Bijna alle docenten zijn erg behulpzaam en als je er zelf moeite in stopt, doen ze dat ook voor jou. Hierdoor ben ik met een goed resultaat geslaagd voor mijn diploma. Er hangt tevens een prettige sfeer. Ik heb een jaar "normaal" onderwijs gehad en een jaar corona-onderwijs, hoewel het laatste erg lastig was voor zowel de leerlingen als de school, heeft Joke Smit wel haar best gedaan. title: I AM College
open_hours: {"Friday":["10 am–5 pm"],"Monday":["10 am–5 pm"],"Saturday":["Closed"],"Sunday":["Closed"],"Thursday":["10 am–5 pm"],"Tuesday":["10 am–5 pm"],"Wednesday":["10 am–5 pm"]}
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Vincent Koot","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJiNyX7dCNq5cl-ddYWbfenDSdZNqQpIeHsMvLyKpCFcxNlqg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Als oud-student van I AM College kan ik vol overtuiging zeggen dat deze opleiding van uitzonderlijke kwaliteit is. Tijdens mijn vier jaar durende opleiding heb ik intensieve begeleiding en aandacht mogen ervaren van de experts, zoals de leraren hier worden genoemd. Wat hen uniek maakt, is dat zij niet alleen lesgeven, maar daarnaast ook actief zijn als ondernemers in hun eigen vakgebied. Hierdoor krijg je als student een waardevolle inkijk in de praktijk en wordt de theorie meteen tastbaar.

De opleiding heeft me niet alleen de technische kennis bijgebracht, maar ook waardevolle levenslessen die onmisbaar zijn in mijn huidige carrière als ondernemer. Je wordt voortdurend uitgedaagd om in de praktijk te leren, en het maken van fouten wordt gezien als een essentieel onderdeel van het leerproces. Het feit dat je hierbij begeleid wordt door experts en ondersteund door je mentor of business coach, zorgt ervoor dat je sterker uit elke uitdaging komt.

Daarnaast is het netwerk dat ik dankzij I AM College heb opgebouwd enorm waardevol gebleken. Het voelde als een sneltrein naar zelfontwikkeling en ondernemerschap. Ik voelde me na mijn afstuderen volledig voorbereid op het echte werk en ik kan met zekerheid zeggen dat deze opleiding me de juiste basis heeft gegeven voor succes.

Kortom, I AM College is een uitstekende keuze voor iedereen die zichzelf wil ontwikkelen en serieus aan de slag wil met ondernemen.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tommmy Den Heijer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIzORCSONlLxRN5I5DG88U8PMgWqwLddBaOqbs6lXJt27hbFA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"IAM College is een school die je echt leert om op je eigen benen te staan. Dit doen ze op een unieke wijze, deze manier werkt niet voor iedereen even goed, maar werkte voor mij uitstekend. Je wordt ontzettend breed opgeleid van de basis van financiën tot maatschappelijk verantwoord ondernemen. Hierdoor ben je op alle fronten goed voorbereid op de toekomst.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"jasper bakker","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIvg9TA6SwsZ34FDvQ9BpFIfYRRfHuYIkpq8aHUbJgUP6knQw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Goeiedaaag iedereen,
Mede mensen van Nederland.

Zeer slechte school, Je krijgt les over ondernemerschap van mensen die geen ondernemers zijn.

Ze zeggen maar een aantal leerlingen aan te nemen op deze opleiding wat echter 9 v de 10x niet het geval is. Er lopen leerlingen rond die net zo goed op mbo 1 konden rondlopen. Totaal geen gemotiveerde leerlingen die op de opleiding zijn.  Zeer onveilig gevoel er lopen beveiligers rond!

De docenten liegen je zo voor! Zelfs de directeur zit gwn een shaggie te draaien op het toilet en laat restjes achter. Ze komen altijd met gladde praatjes over persoonlijke begeleiding bij nieuw komende leerlingen.
Daarna laten ze je achter in de steeg als jan van der steeg zonder enige hulp!!!!!!!!!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Enno Visser","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJZUxPY2miXWyBIVv2_YwSV51k2gx4eOZ4HVydv_kxVpTAuVQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Ik ben een tweede jaars student en als ik terug kijk op de tijd dat ik hier al zit zie ik maar weer hoe veel ik gegroeid ben in deze periode. Met hulp van alle experts en coaches heb ik super veel ondernemerschap geleerd en persoonlijk gegroeid. Ik heb ook al kunnen starten met mijn eigen bedrijfje, waar ik alle hulp voor krijg die ik nodig heb.
Voor mij is dit de school om te leren ondernemen en ik kijk enorm uit naar de volgende 2 jaar.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Arnold Zwarteflikker","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIV2y93nxv4NhsY3-Mp3kmd98A6E-d45-XYvqS2fB6iQw_hnQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Denk dat ik van online YouTube filmpjes nog meer geleerd heb dan het onderwijs hier. Niks is goed geregeld heel slordig. Veel zogeheten "experts" naja gewoon docenten houden zich niet aan hun woord en zijn heel eigenwijs. Ik zou niet naar deze school gaan alleen als zij heel wat verbeterd hebben wat ik in de komende 2 jaar niet zie gebeuren.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Dali Te Braak","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWXg9Uel9b6AWPVUzTyhYZ8byoIXKSb1R1IPcJw9RP7CG_BDcuA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Leuke en leerzame school! Slecht aangekleed en slecht georganiseerd. Leraren kwamen niet echt geïnspireerd en gemotiveerd over. Hierdoor trekken ze ook geen nieuwe leerlingen, en zit je in een negatieve spiraal als school zijnde. Deze school gaat niet op onze lijst. Dus een tip om de open dag aantrekkelijk te maken als je nieuwe leerlingen wilt trekken.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Khalid Hadioui","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIUMVWVFYrGBV_mB0qfyf_e1bMAHmFLdKWBcb-_3HVdcTTAUQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Deze school gunde me niet eens met 0.03 anders zou ik over gaan kkr school","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ano Niem","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKMMFzTvqQ029yJ7y0uYJH9TC45vletwu2H4dghJs9nib0Ozw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Ik heb 6 jaar op het PNC gezeten (tot 2021) en heb hier een ontzettend leuke tijd gehad met veel gezelligheid en vrienden. Qua lessen hing de kwaliteit echt af van de leraar. Ik heb fantastische lessen gehad van sommige zeer betrokken en gepassioneerde docenten, maar ook vreselijke 'lessen' van ongeïnteresseerde leraren die volgens mij liever thuis waren gebleven en vaak op hun telefoon zaten. Vaak waren leraren ook maandenlang afwezig om onbekende redenen. Daardoor heeft onze jaarlaag bijvoorbeeld zo'n 2 jaar aan Frans gemist wat tot enorme achterstanden geleden heeft. Het PNC is een school waar je absoluut zelf initiatief moet tonen en waar de lat enorm hoog ligt, met mentale en zelfs fysieke klachten van vele leerlingen tot gevolg. Ik vond het op veel manieren ook vaak een vrij bureaucratische school waar regels en deadlines boven het persoonlijke leven van de leerlingen gingen. Zo heb ik zelfs een keer meegemaakt dat klasgenoten met zware griep voor één lesuur naar school moesten komen om een presentatie te geven omdat het missen ervan direct tot een 1 op Magister zou leiden. Dit verschilde natuurlijk wel van leraar tot leraar. Over het algemeen is er is weinig sprake van orde tijdens de lessen (wat leidt tot veel kabaal) waardoor de tijd van leerlingen niet goed aan school-gerelateerde zaken kan worden besteed en er al snel een toevlucht gezocht wordt in de iPad. Leraren gaven soms gewoon op en lieten ons dan maar ons gang gaan (screeuwen, gamen, etc.), wat voor leerlingen die wel met interesse naar school kwamen voelde als tijdverspilling omdat je in die tijd ook thuis/in de mediatheek je huiswerk had kunnen doen of toetsen had kunnen voorbereiden. Vanzelfsprekend vond ik dit ook sneu voor de leraar zelf. Ook had het leuk geweest als we bijvoorbeeld met kunst eens naar een museum zouden zijn gegaan, iets waar vaak om gevraagd is maar wat nooit is gebeurd omdat het niet geregeld kon/mocht worden. Wel bereidt het PNC je ontzettend goed voor op de examens, dus daarvoor mijn complimenten. Al met al: dit is een goede school waar ik veel geweldige ervaringen heb opgedaan (en ik had het absoluut voor geen enkele andere school willen verruilen), maar met aardig wat verbeterpunten. Doe er wat mee zou ik zeggen!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Suzanne Van Oirschot","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXif9X3jt258jpQvsqBYAqJxfuBkRNcWi6yTGSmbIYp3nWZwe8=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Super leuke, onderschatte school. Met een leuk en enthousiast docententeam. Havo \u0026 VWO niveau met leerlingen uit de hele stad. Leuke kunstexpo, uitjes en optredens.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipOHOzD65Dffo1sA5PjdwIPVT2g-Qqln7dt7oZ5f\u0026fid=0x0:0xd55df8c7976b5e2a"],"When":"2022-8-29"}]

The architecture is very modern and neat but campus is rather small","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Isabella","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXBgmQsh-PTjwmapCrhPY7Yh7lJEDy9BKlY5fzxDPD1UznPlWrnEQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Big disappointment. The education was a massive let down. I got no feedback on my work, nothing to tell me what I did wrong in exams. I emailed professors asking for advise on how to pass and they would just say, study. As if I wasn't spending day and night studying. We were given too many readings, it was impossible to read everything we were assigned.  Not even the lecturers, save a few, were motivated and enthusiastic about what they taught. It's really one of those universities that buys into the whole elitist model of education. To pass exams it doesn't matter if you know everything and know how to articulate yourself / argue your point, if it doesn't fit with the mark-scheme then it doesn't count. That is not education. For university level education, these aren't the standards i'm used to. On the plus side, the R campus is modern and pretty, but the other campuses are lacking in comparison.

This was for the Political science degree, I hope the other degrees are different.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ева Морозова","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLCZh4vd7VWnTM__4OBbI3-JiFbfCYdafFcUWzze7pJt2EZdw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Hope to be there in a year, my dream uni🥹❤️","Images":null,"When":""}]
